title: Posttraumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD)
content: Exposure to actual or threatened death, serious injury, or sexual violence. Intrusion symptoms: Distressing memories, dreams, dissociative reactions (flashbacks). Avoidance of stimuli associated with the event. Negative alterations in cognitions and mood. Marked alterations in arousal and reactivity (hypervigilance, exaggerated startle).
